description: Define a new S4 generic `summarise_result(object)` in `R/AllGenerics.R` and implement a `ModelResult` method in `R/methods-ModelResult.R`. The method should return a `data.frame` with columns `metric` (character) and `value` (numeric) containing one row per entry in `object@metrics`, plus a `timestamp` row. Include Roxygen documentation and export the generic.
